description: Phase 5 paper-trading gate progress (90 days, Sharpe > 1.0, MaxDD < 15%). Every panel scoped to paper start (2026-04-07) and surfaces insufficient-data / stale states explicitly to avoid the silent-skip failure mode of incident 2026-04-24.

panels.title: Day X / 90
panels.description: Calendar days since paper trading started (2026-04-07). Uses date arithmetic, not row count, so weekend/holiday gaps don't understate progress.

panels.title: Sharpe (30d rolling)
panels.description: Annualised Sharpe over a 30-day rolling window of daily returns. Returns NULL until at least 5 trading days have had fills — see panel 'Days with Fills' for sample-size context. Gate: > 1.0.

targets.rawSql: WITH paper AS (SELECT trading_date, COALESCE(ending_value, starting_value) AS v, num_trades FROM daily_pnl WHERE trading_date >= DATE '2026-04-07'), fills_check AS (SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE num_trades > 0) AS dwf FROM paper), rets AS (SELECT trading_date, (v - LAG(v) OVER (ORDER BY trading_date)) / NULLIF(LAG(v) OVER (ORDER BY trading_date), 0) AS r FROM paper), windowed AS (SELECT trading_date, AVG(r) OVER w AS mu, STDDEV_SAMP(r) OVER w AS sigma FROM rets WHERE r IS NOT NULL WINDOW w AS (ORDER BY trading_date ROWS BETWEEN 29 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW)) SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT dwf FROM fills_check) < 5 THEN NULL WHEN sigma IS NULL OR sigma = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND((SQRT(252) * mu / sigma)::numeric, 2)::float8 END AS "Sharpe" FROM windowed ORDER BY trading_date DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: MaxDD (since paper start)
panels.description: Peak-to-trough drawdown computed only from rows on/after 2026-04-07. Excludes pre-paper March rows. Gate: < 15%.

targets.rawSql: WITH vals AS (SELECT trading_date, COALESCE(ending_value, starting_value) AS v FROM daily_pnl WHERE trading_date >= DATE '2026-04-07' ORDER BY trading_date), running AS (SELECT v, MAX(v) OVER (ORDER BY trading_date ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS peak FROM vals) SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(ABS(MIN((v - peak) / NULLIF(peak, 0) * 100.0))::numeric, 2), 0)::float8 AS "Max DD %" FROM running

panels.title: Data Freshness
panels.description: Hours since the most recent daily_pnl.updated_at. Red > 36h means the daily cron almost certainly failed — a silent skip would otherwise let the dashboard show a stale equity curve as if it were current. Added in response to incident 2026-04-24.

targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND((EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(updated_at))) / 3600)::numeric, 1)::float8 AS "Hours since update" FROM daily_pnl WHERE trading_date >= DATE '2026-04-07'

panels.title: Days with Fills (sample for Sharpe)
panels.description: How many of the recorded paper-trading days actually had at least one fill. Sharpe over zero-trade days is meaningless; this number tells the operator whether the gate sample is real.

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE num_trades > 0)::int AS "Days with fills", COUNT(*)::int AS "Days recorded" FROM daily_pnl WHERE trading_date >= DATE '2026-04-07'

panels.title: Cumulative Paper P&L vs $100K
panels.description: Latest ending_value minus the $100,000 paper starting capital. Single-number answer to 'where do we stand?'. Uses COALESCE so a NULL today's row falls back to its starting_value.

targets.rawSql: SELECT (COALESCE(ending_value, starting_value) - 100000)::float8 AS "P&L" FROM daily_pnl WHERE trading_date >= DATE '2026-04-07' ORDER BY trading_date DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Portfolio Equity Curve (since paper start)
panels.description: Daily ending portfolio value vs the $100,000 paper baseline. Scoped to 2026-04-07 onward so pre-paper March rows do not appear.

targets.rawSql: SELECT trading_date AS time, COALESCE(ending_value, starting_value)::float8 AS "Equity", 100000.0::float8 AS "$100K Baseline" FROM daily_pnl WHERE trading_date >= DATE '2026-04-07' ORDER BY trading_date

panels.title: Drawdown from Peak (gate: > -15%)
panels.description: Rolling peak-to-trough drawdown as a percent. Gate fails if the curve crosses -15%. Scoped to paper-start so the pre-paper -2.6% drawdown row from 2026-03-28 does not appear.

targets.rawSql: WITH vals AS (SELECT trading_date, COALESCE(ending_value, starting_value) AS v FROM daily_pnl WHERE trading_date >= DATE '2026-04-07'), peaks AS (SELECT trading_date, v, MAX(v) OVER (ORDER BY trading_date ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS peak FROM vals) SELECT trading_date AS time, ROUND((100.0 * (v - peak) / NULLIF(peak, 0))::numeric, 2)::float8 AS "Drawdown %" FROM peaks ORDER BY trading_date

panels.title: Daily P&L (since paper start)
panels.description: Per-day total P&L (realized + unrealized) from the generated daily_pnl.total_pnl column. Green bars positive, red bars negative.

targets.rawSql: SELECT trading_date AS time, COALESCE(total_pnl, 0)::float8 AS "Daily P&L" FROM daily_pnl WHERE trading_date >= DATE '2026-04-07' ORDER BY trading_date

panels.title: Gate Criteria Checklist
panels.description: Each gate row shows current value, threshold, and PASS / PENDING / FAIL / INSUFFICIENT-DATA. Insufficient-data states are explicit so 'looks fine' silence cannot hide a stale or empty input.

targets.rawSql: WITH paper AS (SELECT trading_date, COALESCE(ending_value, starting_value) AS v, num_trades, updated_at FROM daily_pnl WHERE trading_date >= DATE '2026-04-07'), peaks AS (SELECT trading_date, v, MAX(v) OVER (ORDER BY trading_date ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS peak FROM paper), maxdd AS (SELECT COALESCE(ABS(MIN((v - peak) / NULLIF(peak, 0) * 100.0)), 0) AS dd_pct FROM peaks), rets AS (SELECT (v - LAG(v) OVER (ORDER BY trading_date)) / NULLIF(LAG(v) OVER (ORDER BY trading_date), 0) AS r FROM paper), fills_check AS (SELECT COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE num_trades > 0) AS dwf, COUNT(*) AS dc FROM paper), sharpe_calc AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT dwf FROM fills_check) < 5 THEN NULL WHEN COUNT(r) < 2 OR STDDEV_SAMP(r) IS NULL OR STDDEV_SAMP(r) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE SQRT(252) * AVG(r) / STDDEV_SAMP(r) END AS s FROM rets WHERE r IS NOT NULL), days AS (SELECT (CURRENT_DATE - DATE '2026-04-07' + 1) AS day_x), fresh AS (SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(updated_at))) / 3600 AS hrs FROM paper) SELECT 'Days elapsed' AS metric, (SELECT day_x FROM days)::text AS current_value, '90' AS threshold, CASE WHEN (SELECT day_x FROM days) >= 90 THEN 'PASS' ELSE 'PENDING (' || (SELECT day_x FROM days)::text || '/90)' END AS status UNION ALL SELECT 'Sharpe (30d)', COALESCE(ROUND((SELECT s FROM sharpe_calc)::numeric, 2)::text, 'N/A'), '> 1.0', CASE WHEN (SELECT s FROM sharpe_calc) IS NULL THEN 'INSUFFICIENT DATA (' || (SELECT dwf FROM fills_check)::text || ' days w/ fills)' WHEN (SELECT s FROM sharpe_calc) >= 1.0 THEN 'PASS' WHEN (SELECT s FROM sharpe_calc) < 0 THEN 'FAIL' ELSE 'PENDING' END UNION ALL SELECT 'Max drawdown', ROUND((SELECT dd_pct FROM maxdd)::numeric, 2)::text || '%', '< 15%', CASE WHEN (SELECT dd_pct FROM maxdd) > 15 THEN 'FAIL' WHEN (SELECT dd_pct FROM maxdd) > 8 THEN 'WARN' ELSE 'PASS' END UNION ALL SELECT 'Days with fills', (SELECT dwf FROM fills_check)::text || ' / ' || (SELECT dc FROM fills_check)::text, '≥ 30 (validity)', CASE WHEN (SELECT dwf FROM fills_check) >= 30 THEN 'PASS' WHEN (SELECT dwf FROM fills_check) >= 5 THEN 'PENDING' ELSE 'INSUFFICIENT DATA' END UNION ALL SELECT 'Data freshness', COALESCE(ROUND((SELECT hrs FROM fresh)::numeric, 1)::text || 'h', 'no data'), '< 36h', CASE WHEN (SELECT hrs FROM fresh) IS NULL THEN 'INSUFFICIENT DATA' WHEN (SELECT hrs FROM fresh) > 36 THEN 'STALE' WHEN (SELECT hrs FROM fresh) > 24 THEN 'WARN' ELSE 'FRESH' END

title: QuantAI — 90-Day Gate Progress
